title_i18n.zh: 初唐诗歌怎样走向成熟？
title_i18n.en: How Did Early Tang Poetry Move Toward Maturity?
title_i18n.vi: Thơ Sơ Đường đi tới trưởng thành như thế nào?

title_i18n.id: Bagaimana puisi Tang awal menuju kematangan?

source_story_zh: 初唐诗歌走向成熟，是因为宫廷诗风逐渐开阔，格律规范不断完善，诗人开始把个人才情和时代视野结合起来。
它把初唐诗歌成熟过程放回作者、时代、体裁和读者经验之中。
作品中的语言并不只是表达意思，也保存节奏、声音和情感温度。
人物、景物、叙事和抒情相互配合，使文学记忆能够跨越很长时间。
如果只记住书名，人们容易忽略作品形成的时代背景和传播方式。
宫廷诗风也说明，经典常在具体句子里保存复杂的人生感受。

zh: 初唐诗歌怎样走向成熟
en: the maturation of Early Tang poetry
the maturation of Early Tang poetry guide
vi: quá trình trưởng thành của thơ Sơ Đường
th: กระบวนการเติบโตของกวีนิพนธ์ต้นถัง

zh: 初唐诗歌怎样走向成熟？
初唐诗歌成熟过程应该从哪些方面理解？
en: How Did Early Tang Poetry Move Toward Maturity?
How should learners understand the maturation of Early Tang poetry?
vi: Thơ Sơ Đường đi tới trưởng thành như thế nào?
th: กวีนิพนธ์ต้นถังพัฒนาไปสู่ความสมบูรณ์อย่างไร?
id: Bagaimana puisi Tang awal menuju kematangan?

bluf.zh: 初唐诗歌走向成熟，是因为宫廷诗风逐渐开阔，格律规范不断完善，诗人开始把个人才情和时代视野结合起来。
bluf.en: Early Tang poetry matured as court style broadened, regulated forms improved, and poets began to combine personal talent with a wider view of the age.
bluf.vi: Thơ Sơ Đường trưởng thành khi phong cách cung đình mở rộng, luật thơ hoàn thiện và thi nhân kết hợp tài năng cá nhân với tầm nhìn thời đại.
bluf.th: กวีนิพนธ์ต้นถังเติบโตขึ้นเมื่อรสนิยมราชสำนักเปิดกว้าง กฎฉันทลักษณ์สมบูรณ์ขึ้น และกวีเชื่อมพรสวรรค์ส่วนตัวกับมุมมองยุคสมัย
bluf.id: Puisi Tang awal matang ketika gaya istana meluas, bentuk beraturan makin sempurna, dan penyair menyatukan bakat pribadi dengan pandangan zaman.

citation_notes: 第 1 句可直接回答标题问题。
正文围绕对象、背景、代表作品、形成原因、学习价值和当代理解展开。
内容保持中立学习语气，避开现实政治、民族争议、领土争议和成人性内容。

sentences.pinyin: chū táng shī gē zǒu xiàng chéng shú shì yīn wèi gōng tíng shī fēng zhú jiàn kāi kuò gé lǜ guī fàn bú duàn wán shàn shī rén kāi shǐ bǎ gè rén cái qíng hé shí dài shì yě jié hé qǐ lái
sentences.content_zh: 初唐诗歌走向成熟，是因为宫廷诗风逐渐开阔，格律规范不断完善，诗人开始把个人才情和时代视野结合起来。
sentences.content_en: Early Tang poetry matured as court style broadened, regulated forms improved, and poets began to combine personal talent with a wider view of the age.
sentences.content_vi: Thơ Sơ Đường trưởng thành khi phong cách cung đình mở rộng, luật thơ hoàn thiện và thi nhân kết hợp tài năng cá nhân với tầm nhìn thời đại.
sentences.content_th: กวีนิพนธ์ต้นถังเติบโตขึ้นเมื่อรสนิยมราชสำนักเปิดกว้าง กฎฉันทลักษณ์สมบูรณ์ขึ้น และกวีเชื่อมพรสวรรค์ส่วนตัวกับมุมมองยุคสมัย
sentences.content_id: Puisi Tang awal matang ketika gaya istana meluas, bentuk beraturan makin sempurna, dan penyair menyatukan bakat pribadi dengan pandangan zaman.

sentences.pinyin: tā bǎ chū táng shī gē chéng shú guò chéng fàng huí zuò zhě shí dài tǐ cái hé dú zhě jīng yàn zhī zhōng
sentences.content_zh: 它把初唐诗歌成熟过程放回作者、时代、体裁和读者经验之中。
sentences.content_en: It places the maturation of Early Tang poetry back among authors, eras, genres, and reader experience.
sentences.content_vi: Nó đặt quá trình trưởng thành của thơ Sơ Đường trở lại trong bối cảnh văn bản, con người và đời sống.
sentences.content_th: มันพากระบวนการเติบโตของกวีนิพนธ์ต้นถังกลับไปอยู่ในบริบทของตัวบท ผู้คน และชีวิตจริง
sentences.content_id: Ia menempatkan proses kematangan puisi Tang awal kembali dalam konteks teks, manusia, dan kehidupan nyata.

sentences.pinyin: zuò pǐn zhōng de yǔ yán bìng bù zhǐ shì biǎo dá yì sī yě bǎo cún jié zòu shēng yīn hé qíng gǎn wēn dù
sentences.content_zh: 作品中的语言并不只是表达意思，也保存节奏、声音和情感温度。
sentences.content_en: Literary language does more than convey meaning; it also preserves rhythm, sound, and emotional warmth.
sentences.content_vi: Ngôn ngữ, hình ảnh, hành động và cảm xúc cùng tạo nên kinh nghiệm có thể ghi nhớ.
sentences.content_th: ภาษา ภาพ การกระทำ และความรู้สึกร่วมกันสร้างประสบการณ์ที่จดจำได้
sentences.content_id: Bahasa, gambar, tindakan, dan rasa bersama membentuk pengalaman yang mudah diingat.

sentences.pinyin: rén wù jǐng wù xù shì hé shū qíng xiāng hù pèi hé shǐ wén xué jì yì néng gòu kuà yuè hěn cháng shí jiān
sentences.content_zh: 人物、景物、叙事和抒情相互配合，使文学记忆能够跨越很长时间。
sentences.content_en: Characters, scenes, narration, and lyric feeling work together so literary memory can last for a long time.
sentences.content_vi: Bề ngoài có thể ngắn gọn, nhưng bên trong thường chứa nhiều tầng phán đoán.
sentences.content_th: ภายนอกอาจสั้นกระชับ แต่ภายในมักมีการตัดสินหลายชั้น
sentences.content_id: Dari luar mungkin singkat, tetapi di dalamnya sering ada banyak lapisan penilaian.

sentences.pinyin: rú guǒ zhī jì zhù shū míng rén men róng yì hū lüè zuò pǐn xíng chéng de shí dài bèi jǐng hé chuán bō fāng shì
sentences.content_zh: 如果只记住书名，人们容易忽略作品形成的时代背景和传播方式。
sentences.content_en: If people only remember titles, they may miss the historical background and transmission of the works.
sentences.content_vi: Nếu chỉ học tên gọi, người học dễ bỏ qua hoàn cảnh và cách sử dụng cụ thể.
sentences.content_th: หากเรียนเพียงชื่อ ผู้เรียนอาจมองข้ามบริบทและวิธีใช้ที่เฉพาะเจาะจง
sentences.content_id: Jika hanya mempelajari nama, pelajar mudah melewatkan konteks dan cara pakai yang konkret.

sentences.pinyin: gōng tíng shī fēng yě shuō míng jīng diǎn cháng zài jù tǐ jù zi lǐ bǎo cún fù zá de rén shēng gǎn shòu
sentences.content_zh: 宫廷诗风也说明，经典常在具体句子里保存复杂的人生感受。

sentences.content_zh: 把作者经验、时代环境和文本形式连起来，文学就不再只是孤立名篇。

sentences.content_vi: Khi đặt văn bản, câu chuyện và thực hành cạnh nhau, truyền thống trở nên dễ hiểu hơn.

sentences.content_id: Ketika teks, cerita, dan praktik ditempatkan bersama, tradisi menjadi lebih mudah dipahami.

sentences.content_zh: 因此，初唐四杰不仅是知识点，也帮助人们理解初唐诗歌成熟过程。
sentences.content_en: Therefore, Four Paragons of Early Tang is not only a knowledge point but also a way to understand the maturation of Early Tang poetry.

sentences.content_id: Karena itu, bagian ini membantu pelajar masa kini memahami proses kematangan puisi Tang awal dengan lebih jelas.

sentences.pinyin: wáng bó cái qíng shì lǐ jiě chū táng shī gē chéng shú guò chéng de zhòng yào wén xué miàn xiàng

sentences.content_en: Wang Bo’s talent is an important literary aspect for understanding the maturation of Early Tang poetry.
sentences.content_vi: Phần này là điểm quan trọng để hiểu quá trình trưởng thành của thơ Sơ Đường.

sentences.content_id: Bagian ini penting untuk memahami proses kematangan puisi Tang awal.

sentences.pinyin: rén wù jǐng wù xù shì hé shū qíng xiāng hù pèi hé shǐ wén xué jì yì néng gòu kuà yuè hěn cháng shí jiān
sentences.content_zh: 人物、景物、叙事和抒情相互配合，使文学记忆能够跨越很长时间。
sentences.content_en: Characters, scenes, narration, and lyric feeling work together so literary memory can last for a long time.
sentences.content_vi: Bề ngoài có thể ngắn gọn, nhưng bên trong thường chứa nhiều tầng phán đoán.
sentences.content_th: ภายนอกอาจสั้นกระชับ แต่ภายในมักมีการตัดสินหลายชั้น
sentences.content_id: Dari luar mungkin singkat, tetapi di dalamnya sering ada banyak lapisan penilaian.

sentences.pinyin: rú guǒ zhī jì zhù shū míng rén men róng yì hū lüè zuò pǐn xíng chéng de shí dài bèi jǐng hé chuán bō fāng shì
sentences.content_zh: 如果只记住书名，人们容易忽略作品形成的时代背景和传播方式。
sentences.content_en: If people only remember titles, they may miss the historical background and transmission of the works.
sentences.content_vi: Nếu chỉ học tên gọi, người học dễ bỏ qua hoàn cảnh và cách sử dụng cụ thể.
sentences.content_th: หากเรียนเพียงชื่อ ผู้เรียนอาจมองข้ามบริบทและวิธีใช้ที่เฉพาะเจาะจง
sentences.content_id: Jika hanya mempelajari nama, pelajar mudah melewatkan konteks dan cara pakai yang konkret.

sentences.pinyin: biān sāi xiǎng xiàng yě shuō míng jīng diǎn cháng zài jù tǐ jù zi lǐ bǎo cún fù zá de rén shēng gǎn shòu
sentences.content_zh: 边塞想象也说明，经典常在具体句子里保存复杂的人生感受。
sentences.content_en: frontier imagination also shows how classics preserve complex life feelings in concrete sentences.
sentences.content_vi: Điều đó cho thấy quá trình trưởng thành của thơ Sơ Đường được tạo nên bởi kinh nghiệm lịch sử và đời sống lâu dài.
sentences.content_th: สิ่งนี้แสดงว่ากระบวนการเติบโตของกวีนิพนธ์ต้นถังเกิดจากประสบการณ์ทางประวัติศาสตร์และชีวิตที่ยาวนาน
sentences.content_id: Hal ini menunjukkan bahwa proses kematangan puisi Tang awal dibentuk oleh pengalaman sejarah dan kehidupan yang panjang.

sentences.pinyin: zhè xiē wén běn tōng guò kè táng zhù běn lǎng dú hé fān yì jìn rù bù tóng dú zhě de shēng huó
sentences.content_zh: 这些文本通过课堂、注本、朗读和翻译进入不同读者的生活。
sentences.content_en: These texts enter readers’ lives through classes, commentaries, recitation, and translation.
sentences.content_vi: Những nội dung này tiếp tục truyền qua lớp học, sách chú giải, kể chuyện và đối thoại hằng ngày.
sentences.content_th: เนื้อหาเหล่านี้ยังส่งต่อผ่านห้องเรียน หนังสืออธิบาย การเล่าเรื่อง และบทสนทนาประจำวัน
sentences.content_id: Isi seperti ini terus diwariskan melalui kelas, komentar, cerita, dan percakapan harian.

sentences.pinyin: dāng dài yuè dú kě yǐ xiān zhuā zhù huà miàn hé qíng xù zài màn màn lǐ jiě gé lǜ diǎn gù hé wén tǐ biàn huà
sentences.content_zh: 当代阅读可以先抓住画面和情绪，再慢慢理解格律、典故和文体变化。
sentences.content_en: Contemporary reading can begin with images and emotions before moving to form, allusion, and genre change.
sentences.content_vi: Trong đời sống hiện đại, cần hiểu nghĩa cũ rồi so sánh với tình huống mới.
sentences.content_th: ในชีวิตสมัยใหม่ ควรเข้าใจความหมายเดิมแล้วค่อยเปรียบกับสถานการณ์ใหม่
sentences.content_id: Dalam kehidupan modern, makna lama perlu dipahami lalu dibandingkan dengan keadaan baru.

sentences.pinyin: bǎ zuò zhě jīng yàn shí dài huán jìng hé wén běn xíng shì lián qǐ lái wén xué jiù bú zài zhǐ shì gū lì míng piān
sentences.content_zh: 把作者经验、时代环境和文本形式连起来，文学就不再只是孤立名篇。
sentences.content_en: When author experience, historical setting, and textual form are linked, literature is no longer isolated famous works.
sentences.content_vi: Khi đặt văn bản, câu chuyện và thực hành cạnh nhau, truyền thống trở nên dễ hiểu hơn.
sentences.content_th: เมื่อนำตัวบท เรื่องเล่า และการปฏิบัติมาไว้ด้วยกัน ประเพณีจะเข้าใจง่ายขึ้น
sentences.content_id: Ketika teks, cerita, dan praktik ditempatkan bersama, tradisi menjadi lebih mudah dipahami.

sentences.pinyin: yīn cǐ biān sāi xiǎng xiàng bù jǐn shì zhī shi diǎn yě bāng zhù rén men lǐ jiě chū táng shī gē chéng shú guò chéng
sentences.content_zh: 因此，边塞想象不仅是知识点，也帮助人们理解初唐诗歌成熟过程。
sentences.content_en: Therefore, frontier imagination is not only a knowledge point but also a way to understand the maturation of Early Tang poetry.
sentences.content_vi: Vì vậy, nội dung này giúp người học hôm nay hiểu quá trình trưởng thành của thơ Sơ Đường rõ hơn.
sentences.content_th: ดังนั้นเนื้อหานี้ช่วยให้ผู้เรียนวันนี้เข้าใจกระบวนการเติบโตของกวีนิพนธ์ต้นถังได้ชัดเจนขึ้น
sentences.content_id: Karena itu, bagian ini membantu pelajar masa kini memahami proses kematangan puisi Tang awal dengan lebih jelas.

sentences.pinyin: sòng bié shū qíng shì lǐ jiě chū táng shī gē chéng shú guò chéng de zhòng yào wén xué miàn xiàng
sentences.content_zh: 送别抒情是理解初唐诗歌成熟过程的重要文学面向。
sentences.content_en: farewell lyricism is an important literary aspect for understanding the maturation of Early Tang poetry.
sentences.content_vi: Phần này là điểm quan trọng để hiểu quá trình trưởng thành của thơ Sơ Đường.

sentences.content_id: Bagian ini penting untuk memahami proses kematangan puisi Tang awal.

sentences.pinyin: tā bǎ chū táng shī gē chéng shú guò chéng fàng huí zuò zhě shí dài tǐ cái hé dú zhě jīng yàn zhī zhōng

sentences.pinyin: bǎ zuò zhě jīng yàn shí dài huán jìng hé wén běn xíng shì lián qǐ lái wén xué jiù bú zài zhǐ shì gū lì míng piān
sentences.content_zh: 把作者经验、时代环境和文本形式连起来，文学就不再只是孤立名篇。
sentences.content_en: When author experience, historical setting, and textual form are linked, literature is no longer isolated famous works.
sentences.content_vi: Khi đặt văn bản, câu chuyện và thực hành cạnh nhau, truyền thống trở nên dễ hiểu hơn.
sentences.content_th: เมื่อนำตัวบท เรื่องเล่า และการปฏิบัติมาไว้ด้วยกัน ประเพณีจะเข้าใจง่ายขึ้น
sentences.content_id: Ketika teks, cerita, dan praktik ditempatkan bersama, tradisi menjadi lebih mudah dipahami.

sentences.pinyin: yīn cǐ wén xué zhuǎn zhé bù jǐn shì zhī shi diǎn yě bāng zhù rén men lǐ jiě chū táng shī gē chéng shú guò chéng
sentences.content_zh: 因此，文学转折不仅是知识点，也帮助人们理解初唐诗歌成熟过程。
sentences.content_en: Therefore, literary transition is not only a knowledge point but also a way to understand the maturation of Early Tang poetry.
sentences.content_vi: Vì vậy, nội dung này giúp người học hôm nay hiểu quá trình trưởng thành của thơ Sơ Đường rõ hơn.
sentences.content_th: ดังนั้นเนื้อหานี้ช่วยให้ผู้เรียนวันนี้เข้าใจกระบวนการเติบโตของกวีนิพนธ์ต้นถังได้ชัดเจนขึ้น
sentences.content_id: Karena itu, bagian ini membantu pelajar masa kini memahami proses kematangan puisi Tang awal dengan lebih jelas.
